user.title: Adaptive Lighting
user.description: Select the lights or light groups to control. Everything else is configured in the Adaptive Lighting panel in the sidebar.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Adaptive Lighting is already configured. Only one instance is supported.

init.title: Controlled lights
init.description: Choose which lights or light groups Adaptive Lighting controls.

apply.name: Apply
apply.description: Force an immediate adaptation of the controlled lights.

entity_id.name: Lights
entity_id.description: Light entities to adapt. Defaults to all controlled lights.

set_manual_control.name: Set manual control
set_manual_control.description: Pause or resume adaptation for specific lights.

manual_control.name: Manual control
manual_control.description: True to pause adaptation, false to resume it.
